about_desc: This program was made by KarmaDevz, it was made for the community to enjoy their games in a better way on Discord. Please consider supporting my work by giving a star on the GitHub repository, donations will be well received :D.
selection_required_msg: Please select an option from the list.
games_config_invalid: ⚠️ games_config_merged.json does not contain a valid JSON object.
ask_cookie:
Do you want to get the Steam cookie for Rich Presence?
Make sure you are logged into Steam on Microsoft Edge.
edge_open_confirm:
Microsoft Edge is open.

It needs to be closed to continue.
Close it automatically now?
cookie_invalid: Steam cookie from .env is invalid or expired.
cookie_not_found: Could not automatically obtain Steam cookie.
cookie_auto_found: Steam cookie automatically obtained from browser profile.
game_name: What game will you force today?
notify_background: The program is running in the background
no_games_found: No games found in the configuration.
env_cannot_create: Unable to create .env next to exe; created at: {alt}
geforce_not_found: GeForce NOW not found. Start it manually.
discord_not_found: Discord not found at default location.
cookie_prompt_invalid: Cookie invalid or not present. Try to obtain it now?
ask_discord_match: A new game was found. Select correct Discord match (if any):
error_no_config: No configuration file found. Please select one.
latest_version_msg: You are using the latest version.
gfn_corrupted_msg:
GeForce NOW application resource corrupted.
Please download and reinstall from the link below:
log_viewer_desc: Application event history. If you experience issues, you can export this file to send it.
crash_msg: The application has suffered an unhandled critical error. Details have been saved to logs. You can copy the error below to report it.
gfn_install_question:
GeForce NOW is not installed or not found in the default path.

Do you want to download and install GeForce NOW automatically now?
startup_re_enabled_msg: Startup with Windows has been re-enabled.
discord_not_found_msg: Discord not found at the default location.
cookie_manual_prompt:
Automated cookie retrieval did not succeed.

Do you want to enter the 'steamLoginSecure' cookie manually?
cookie_invalid_msg: The cookie entered is invalid or expired. Please check it and try again.
cookie_err_not_found: No Steam cookie profiles were found in any local browser.
cookie_err_expired: Steam cookies were found in your profiles, but all of them have expired or are invalid.
cookie_err_headless: Headless background auto-retrieval failed or could not access the browser profile.
cookie_err_cancelled: Cancelled by user or authentication incomplete.
config_show_lobby: Show GeForce NOW when no game is active
